description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a medium-gray fabric. The sofa features two large, loose back cushions and a single, continuous seat cushion, both of which appear plush and comfortable. The armrests are broad, straight, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a boxy, geometric silhouette. The back of the sofa is fully upholstered and flat, matching the overall clean lines of the piece. The legs are not visible, suggesting they are either recessed or the sofa sits directly on a low platform base. The upholstery has a subtle woven texture, adding a touch of visual interest to the otherwise solid color.
description: A modern gray sofa with broad, straight armrests, two large back cushions, and a single seat cushion, all upholstered in subtly textured fabric.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large back cushions, a single seat cushion, and broad, straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick armrest and the depth of the back and seat cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, fully upholstered back and the boxy silhouette.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion depth seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose back cushions and a single, continuous seat cushion; all cushions are uniform in size and appear unattached.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight armrests at seat and backrest height, with a boxy, rectangular profile and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a recessed or platform base design with no exposed legs.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two large, loose cushions; continuous and unsegmented structure.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a subtle woven texture; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
